description_long: This futuristic caravan features a streamlined, aerodynamic body with a predominantly white exterior accented by large blue solar panels on both sides. The front showcases three large, tinted windows with angular frames, flanked by robust headlights and a prominent sensor mast equipped with cameras and antennas. The sides are fitted with circular, metallic entry hatches and six rugged wheels with deep treads, supported by visible suspension components in a bronze finish. The rear is smooth and enclosed, with no visible windows, emphasizing the vehicle's insulated and secure design. The roof is equipped with a ribbed skylight or ventilation panel and a tall communications mast, suggesting advanced onboard systems. The overall design blends high-tech utility with comfort, making it suitable for extended urban or off-grid travel.
description: A sleek, high-tech caravan with a white body, blue solar panels, large tinted windows, and six rugged wheels. It features a sensor mast, circular side hatches, and advanced roof equipment.
description_view_0: Front view shows three large, angular tinted windows, robust headlights, and a tall sensor mast with cameras and antennas.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the blue solar panel, circular entry hatch, and three rugged wheels with visible suspension.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals a smooth, windowless back with the continuation of the blue solar panels and the ribbed roof vent.
description_view_3: Right side view mirrors the left, with a blue solar panel, circular hatch, and three wheels, plus a clear view of the roof mast.
attribute_door_placement: left side, center; right side, center
